case_title: TONG, KENNETH vs. KIRKWOOD, STUART et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, CALENDAR OF JUL-07-1993, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER ALSO JURY AND COURT REPORTER'S FEE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRKWOOD, STUART THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1658 WASHINGTON ST #1, S.F. $3,400.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,400.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-31-1993, LEASE FORFEITED

DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. FOR REST. PREMISES AT 1658 WASHINGTON, #1, S.F, CA. - WRIT ISSUES IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 8-31-93 - $3400 R&D, BUT PL. WILL ACCEPT $1200 IF PD WITHIN 1 YR. OF TODAY - IF PD. PL. WILL S/A JUDGMENT & DISM - MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS.
